mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other kinases, blocking FLT3-ITD signaling in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; very potent versus FLT3-ITD AML lines (e.g., MOLM13-like).

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other receptor tyrosine kinases, reducing AML cell growth
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; inhibits proliferation of FLT3-ITD AML lines.

mechanism: Blocks MET/AXL/VEGFR and has reported FLT3 activity; active in FLT3-ITD AML in vitro
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC; reported activity in FLT3-ITD AML.

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR and has reported FLT3 inhibitory activity in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; inhibits FLT3-ITD AML cells in vitro.

mechanism: Inhibits multiple kinases including FLT3; active in FLT3-ITD AML models
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; reported activity in FLT3-ITD AML.

mechanism: Blocks MEK1/2, suppressing downstream FLT3/MAPK signaling in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; antiproliferative in AML lines.

mechanism: Inhibits SYK, a survival node in AML
additional_notes: Approved for ITP; activity reported in MOLM13-like AML lines; active moiety is R406.

mechanism: Inhibits protein translation, leading to cytotoxicity in myeloid leukemia cells
additional_notes: Approved for CML; broadly cytotoxic to myeloid leukemia.

mechanism: Inhibits the proteasome, inducing apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Approved for MM/MCL; potent anti-AML activity in many cell lines.

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases, causing epigenetic reprogramming and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM; active at low nanomolar in AML lines.

mechanism: Inhibits class I HDACs (HDAC1/2), leading to potent AML cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Approved for CTCL; very potent; light sensitive.

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial protein synthesis, selectively affecting AML cells
additional_notes: AML cells (incl. FLT3-ITD) are sensitive; light sensitive.

mechanism: Acts as a mitochondrial uncoupler and inhibits Wnt signaling, inducing AML cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Anthelmintic; highly lipophilic; pre-dissolve in DMSO; consider Pluronic F-68 if precipitation occurs.

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, increasing ROS and inducing apoptosis in AML cells
additional_notes: Anti-rheumatic; induces ROS in AML cells.

mechanism: Generates ROS and perturbs membranes, killing leukemia cells
additional_notes: Leprosy drug; highly lipophilic; pre-dissolve in DMSO; possible need for surfactant if precipitation.

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 signaling, critical in FLT3-ITD AML (e.g., MOLM13)
additional_notes: Antipsychotic; reported to inhibit growth of FLT3-ITD AML cells.

mechanism: Inhibits ALDH and, with copper co-supplementation, disrupts proteasome/NPL4 function in AML cells
additional_notes: Test with 1 µM CuCl2 co-supplement; disulfiram is unstable—prepare fresh and protect from light.
